title: stelis frondifera
intro: Stelis frondifera, also known as the leafy stelis, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Stelis frondifera include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even exhibit antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of Stelis frondifera are often made by infusing the plant in hot water or using it in combination with other herbs to create teas, infusions, and tinctures.
